howItWorks.intro: This tile & grout calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Tiles = Area (sq ft) × (144 / tile size²) × (1 + waste %)
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How many tiles do I need?
faq.answer: Calculate your area in sq ft, then divide by the tile area. Add 10% for waste from cuts. For diagonal patterns, add 15% waste.
